title: Tea Time ☕
description: Adds tea to Minecraft, giving special effects when consumed
body:
[![MesoMods Banner](https://files.catbox.moe/2coczi.webp)](https://zap-hosting.com/mesomods?voucher=MesoMods-2998)

Tea Time is a simple Minecraft mod, adding different types of tea each of them giving you another effect when consumed. There are basic ones, that give you vanilla minecraft effects but there are also special ones with unique abilities. To make teas, you need a cup made of three pieces of clay. Fill them with water, combine them with one special ingredient - and drink them. And yes, you can actually stack them to 16. Here´s a list of all types of tea you can currently make:
